description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a sharply angular, stealth-inspired design, featuring a predominantly dark gray and silver color scheme accented by red and black markings. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated smoothly into the fuselage, giving the aircraft a futuristic, aggressive appearance. Twin jet engines are mounted at the rear, flanked by angular exhaust ports and intakes, suggesting high-speed capability. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed by a dark, tinted canopy, blending seamlessly into the fuselage. The tail section features twin vertical stabilizers canted outward, contributing to the aircraft's advanced aerodynamic profile. No visible landing gear is present, and the surface finish appears smooth and metallic, with minimal surface texture.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin rear jet engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit, finished in dark gray, silver, and red accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin jet exhausts, sharply swept wings, and the angular nose with red and black markings.
description_view_1: Left rear oblique view highlighting the wing's sweep, the twin vertical stabilizers, and the integrated engine nacelles.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical, stealthy planform.
description_view_3: Right rear oblique view mirroring the left, emphasizing the angular tail and wing design with visible red and black accents.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with integrated wing roots and no visible winglets; slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted within the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers in a V-tail configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy.
